prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-FIDGETTOY-PW418-PNK-AMZ Product Type: FIDGET_TOY Brand (from catalog): Nickelodeon Existing Title: Paw Patrol Push Pop It Sensory Fidget Toys Stress and Anxiety Relief with Keychain - Pink Description: These silicone Paw Patrol-themed pop-it fidget toys or sensory toys help to relieve stress and anxiety in kids of all ages. Popping the bubbles on the pop it toy aids with focus and attention by allowing the brain to filter extraneous sensory information in a child's current environment, whether it be at school, doing homework or falling asleep. The pop it toys can be played as a game between friends and family, making it a fun and multipurpose toy for kids of all ages.

The Paw Patrol push pop-it fidget toys or sensory toys comes with a handy built-in keychain, so kids and little ones can attach the pop to lunch bags, backpacks, sports bags, and more to keep it safe and secure to prevent the sensory toy from getting lost. POP IT GAME PLAYING INSTRUCTIONS: Each player takes a turn by pressing down any number of bubbles they wish in a single row, while the second player starts by pressing the connected bubbles; the player who presses down the last one loses; then flip the pop it fidget toy sensory toy and start again.

Officially licensed Paw Patrol merchandise. Search Terms: push pop bubble fidget sensory toy 71600 push pop bubble fidget toy 2400 pop push bubble sensory fidget toys sets 800 push bubble pop fidget sensory toy 800 push pop pop bubble sensory fidget toy 700 push pop bubble fidget toy for kids 700 push pop Features: - STRESS RELIEF POP IT FIDGET TOY: These Paw Patrol themed pop it fidget toys or sensory toys help to relieve stress and anxiety in kids of all ages; popping the bubbles on the pop it toy aids with focus and attention by allowing the brain to filter extraneous sensory information in their current environment; the pop it toy can be played as game between friends and family! - KEEP SECURE WITH HANDY KEYCHAIN: The Paw Patrol push pop it fidget toys or sensory toys comes with a handy built in keychain, so kids and little ones can attach the pop it to lunch bags, backpacks, sports bags and more, to keep it safe and secure and to prevent the sensory toy from getting lost - SAFE AND DURABLE SILICONE MATERIAL: Made from silicone, the bubble popping sensory toys are soft to touch; the silicone material makes the pop it toy long lasting, standing up to lots of presses and pops! - POP IT GAME PLAYING INSTRUCTIONS: Each player takes turn by pressing down any number of bubbles they wish in a single row, while the second player starts by pressing the connected bubbles; the player who presses down the last one loses; then flip the pop it fidget toy sensory toy and start again! - SPECIFICIATIONS: Dimensions: 4.5 x 4.5 x .5 inches; Colors: Blue or Pink; Material: Silicone === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Nickelodeon Paw Patrol Push Pop Fidget Toy Pink

anthropic.title_differentiation: Stress Relief Sensory Toy, Built-in Keychain, Durable Silicone, Focus And Anxiety Aid
